rulings.Case Title: KEVIN SINCLAIR ET AL VS. JIAN MING CHEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 25, 2016 line 1. DEFENDANT ZIPREALTY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, MICHAEL SON's Motion To Strike Second Amended Complaint continued to August 30, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 50 1no later than July 29, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RUDOLPH FISHER VS. NORTH BEACH HOTEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 25, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH HOTEL, LARISH BURLYGA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with CCP 430.41 in good faith. Defendant attempted to contact Plaintiff on June 10, 2016, 14 days after the complaint was filed and 1 day after the Defendant was served. Plaintiff was not available and Defendant was instructed to call back later. Defendant executed the CCP 430.41 declaration on June 10, 2016 before any attempt to call back and filed this demurrer, 4 days later. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WESSAM REFAT VS. THE MOSSER COMPANIES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 25, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with 10-day leave to amend to allege fraud cause of action with requisite particularity. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES CIARDI ET AL VS. NORM NEILSEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
